_meta.resume_note: Pinned to the January 1 archive of the official 2025-2026 American River College catalog. The pre-Biology-2.0 A.S.-T. in Biology is fully extracted from catalog page 267; it requires a two-course physics sequence and prints 32-34 major units.

degrees.tmc_version_basis: The 2025-2026 award requires calculus and one complete two-course physics sequence, matching the prior Biology TMC rather than Biology 2.0.
degrees.catalog_status_seen: Listed in the January 1 archive of the official 2025-2026 catalog; no inactive or teach-out language is displayed.

sources.locator: Catalog page 267 (PDF page 269), Biology and Biotechnology > Associate Degrees for Transfer > A.S.-T. in Biology > Degree Requirements

major_groups.label_seen: Degree Requirements — required biology and chemistry

courses.title_seen: Introduction to Biology: Biodiversity, Evolution, and Ecology
Calculus for Biology and Medicine I

major_groups.label_seen: Degree Requirements — complete one physics sequence
major_groups.choice_structure_seen: Complete PHYS 350 and PHYS 360 (8 units), or complete PHYS 410 and PHYS 421 (9 units); courses may not be mixed across sequences.

major_groups.label_seen: California General Education Transfer Curriculum (Cal-GETC) Requirement
Transferable electives as needed to complete 60 units

degrees.notes: The 2025-2026 degree page requires Cal-GETC but does not restate its unit minimum, so units_min is left null. The catalog prints 32-34 major units and a 60-unit degree total. This is materially different from the 2026-2027 Biology 2.0 record: BIOL 415 is required, a complete two-course physics sequence is required, and the later Biology 2.0 List A is absent.

notes: The official 2025-2026 catalog lists the pre-Biology-2.0 A.S.-T. in Biology and no general local Biology A.S. or A.A. The statewide discovery snapshot was collected later and includes Biology 2.0, but it is not used as 2025-2026 catalog evidence.
